notes: Pass provides free admission; source: "Free admission for 2 adults and children under the age of 18 for 38 historic New England houses".
raw: Free admission for 2 adults and children under the age of 18 for 38 historic New England houses. Each home has different hours so please check their website at https://www.historicnewengland.org/ for the hours to each home.

source_phrases.max_adults: 2 adults and children under the age of 18
